# BAEM1N.DEV

> AI, 데이터, 자동화, 개발 기록을 공유하는 개인 개발 블로그.
> A personal dev blog sharing hands-on experiments in AI, data engineering, local LLM inference, RAG, AI agents, and automation.

Author: 배기민 / baem1n — AI/Data Educator & Engineer, DDOK.AI Founder.
Contact: [Email](mailto:gm.bae@ddok.ai), [GitHub](https://github.com/baem1n), [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/baem1n/), [Hugging Face](https://huggingface.co/baem1n).
Trust note: benchmark posts link to source code, raw CSV/results, methodology notes, and disclosure statements when the author maintains a related project.
Full content: [llms-full.txt](/llms-full.txt).
Last updated: 2026-06-15.

## Key Facts

- [BAEM1N.DEV](/): Personal technical blog by baem1n / 배기민.
- [About](/about/): Author credentials, projects, training history, open-source work, contact, and disclosure notes.
- [English About](/en/about/): English author profile and disclosure notes.
- [Qwen3.5 Benchmark Results](/posts/llm-bench-03-results-tables/): Controlled local LLM inference benchmark across 4 hardware platforms and 5 engines.
- [Phoenix + LangChain Tracing Series](/posts/arize-phoenix-langchain-tracing/): Arize Phoenix, OpenTelemetry/OpenInference, LangChain auto-instrumentation, and CallbackHandler wrapper design.
- [RunPod Referral](/posts/runpod-referral-gpu-cloud/): RunPod referral credit details.
- [Vultr Referral](/posts/vultr-referral-cloud-server/): Vultr referral credit details.

## Expertise

- [RAG and GraphRAG](/tags/rag/): Retrieval-augmented generation, Apache AGE, pgvector, LangChain, and PostgreSQL-based GraphRAG.
- [Local LLM Benchmarking](/tags/local-llm/): Qwen3.5 inference measurement, llama.cpp, MLX, Ollama, vLLM, Lemonade, NVIDIA/AMD/Apple Silicon.
- [AI Agents](/tags/ai-agent/): Deep Agents SDK, LangGraph, HITL approval, Tauri, SSE streaming, memory, and tool orchestration.
- [LLM-as-Judge Evaluation](/tags/llm-judge/): Cross-judge RAG answer scoring with local and API LLM judges.
- [LLMOps and Observability](/tags/llmops/): Arize Phoenix, OpenTelemetry, OpenInference, LangChain tracing, and callback-handler instrumentation.

## Core Pages

- [Homepage](/): Featured posts and latest writing.
- [About](/about/): Author bio and credentials.
- [About in English](/en/about/): English author bio and credentials.
- [All Korean Posts](/posts/): Korean blog archive.
- [All English Posts](/en/posts/): English blog archive.
- [Tags](/tags/): Posts grouped by topic.
- [Search](/search/): Site search.
- [RSS Feed](/rss.xml): RSS feed.

## Priority Blog Posts

### LLM Benchmarks

- [Qwen3.5 Local Inference Benchmark Results](/posts/llm-bench-03-results-tables/): 4 hardware platforms × 5 inference engines × Qwen3.5 9B/27B/35B-A3B/122B-A10B results.
- [Qwen3.5 Benchmark Methodology](/posts/llm-bench-01-methodology/): Cache isolation, cold prefill, nonce prefixes, random run order, and measurement protocol.
- [Qwen3.5 Cross-Platform Analysis](/posts/llm-bench-02-results-analysis/): Main findings from the hardware and engine comparison.

### Korean RAG Benchmark

- [Korean RAG Benchmark — Methodology (pillar)](/posts/korean-rag-bench-methodology/): 300 Q&A × 58 PDF × 5 domains, 6-stage component comparison + 384-combination Cartesian sweep, 46 generators, 4-metric LLM-as-Judge, ~1.2M LLM calls.
- [Ingestion — Loader · Chunker · Embedding](/posts/korean-rag-bench-ingestion/): PyMuPDF MRR 0.6486; LC Recursive 300/50; KoE5 beats qwen3-embed-8b by +0.16 MRR.
- [Retrieval — Dense · BM25-KIWI · Hybrid](/posts/korean-rag-bench-retrieval/): Hybrid 3:7 MRR 0.7171; KIWI morphological BM25 +14.4pp over whitespace.
- [Reranker — 25 rerankers](/posts/korean-rag-bench-reranker/): a 0.6B Korean reranker (dragonkue, MRR 0.7697) beats Qwen3-Reranker-4B (0.7514) by +1.83pp.
- [Generators & Judges — 46 generators](/posts/korean-rag-bench-generators-judges/): gpt-oss-120b/kimi-k2.5 0.740 open-weight; gpt-oss-20b 0.727 at 13GB VRAM; judge robustness across 20 judges.
- [Cartesian Sweep — 384 combinations](/posts/korean-rag-bench-cartesian/): query2doc + jina-reranker-m0 wins (judge 4.067 / acc 0.827); MRR-best ≠ judge-best.
- [Final Synthesis — winner pipeline & 7 findings](/posts/korean-rag-bench-final-analysis/): pipeline tuning beats model upgrade — GPT-5.4 + tuned pipeline 0.827, +6.0pp over GPT-5.4-pro.

### GraphRAG / PostgreSQL

- [GraphRAG with PostgreSQL](/posts/graphrag-with-postgresql/): Apache AGE + pgvector GraphRAG without Neo4j.
- [Neo4j vs Apache AGE Benchmark](/posts/neo4j-vs-age-benchmark/): Cypher benchmark comparing Neo4j and Apache AGE.
- [langchain-age Hybrid Search](/posts/langchain-age-hybrid-search/): Similarity, MMR, hybrid search, and metadata filters.

### AI Agent / DeepCoWork

- [DeepCoWork Introduction](/posts/deepcowork-01-introduction/): Deep Agents SDK + Tauri 2 open-source AI agent desktop app.
- [DeepCoWork Security](/posts/deepcowork-11-security/): Path traversal, input validation, CSP, CORS, and safe tool execution.

### LLMOps / Observability

- [Arize Phoenix Introduction](/posts/arize-phoenix-llmops-observability/): Phoenix as an open-source LLMOps tool for traces, evaluations, datasets, and OpenTelemetry/OpenInference-based observability.
- [Phoenix LangChain Tracing](/posts/arize-phoenix-langchain-tracing/): How `register(auto_instrument=True)` works, how OpenInference injects `OpenInferenceTracer`, and when CallbackHandler-style tracing is useful.
- [PhoenixCallbackHandler Design](/posts/phoenix-callbackhandler-openinference/): Package design for wrapping OpenInference's LangChain tracer as an explicit Phoenix CallbackHandler without reimplementing span mapping.
- [Arize Phoenix Introduction — English](/en/posts/arize-phoenix-llmops-observability/): English version of the Phoenix LLMOps overview.
- [Phoenix LangChain Tracing — English](/en/posts/arize-phoenix-langchain-tracing/): English version of the auto-instrumentation versus CallbackHandler analysis.
- [PhoenixCallbackHandler Design — English](/en/posts/phoenix-callbackhandler-openinference/): English version of the OpenInference wrapper design.

## Contact

- [Email](mailto:gm.bae@ddok.ai): Contact for AI/data education, RAG, LLMOps, and local LLM benchmark inquiries.
- [GitHub](https://github.com/baem1n): Source code and open-source projects.
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/baem1n/): Professional profile.
